query: intentional camera movement abstract blur swirl impressionistic photo
message: sub:intentional_blur/ICM_abstract — anti_aesthetic — swirl, zoom blur, vertical pan, painterly motion abstraction

response.objective_caption: Vertical streaks of green, yellow, and blue light interweave with dark branching silhouettes, creating flowing ribbons of foliage and sky viewed from below within a dense canopy of trees.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Vertical motion blur streaks green, yellow, and blue light into flowing ribbons that interweave with dark tree branches, transforming the forest canopy into an abstract arrangement of color and gesture where leaves and sky dissolve into pure chromatic movement.
